# MiniFW-AI вЂ” Demo Package Structure

> Version: v2.2.0 | GPG key: BDB471E1FB46F58A

This document describes the layout and purpose of each demo package in `dist/`. Use it to orient a new reviewer, prepare a USB handoff, or verify a package is complete before a demo.

---

## Current Packages

| Package | Sector | Type | Port | Credentials | Entry Point |
|---------|--------|------|------|-------------|-------------|
| `minifw-usb-hospital-standalone-v2.2.0/` | Hospital | Standalone (Python, no Docker) | 8000 | `admin / Hospital1!` | `bash run_demo.sh` |
| `minifw-usb-hospital-v2.2.0/` | Hospital | Docker USB Kit | 8443 (HTTPS) | `admin / Hospital1!` | `bash demo.sh` |
| `minifw-usb-education-v2.2.0/` | Education | Docker USB Kit | 8447 (HTTPS) | `admin / Education1!` | `bash demo.sh` |
| `minifw-usb-gambling-v2.2.0/` | Gambling | Docker USB Kit | 8446 (HTTPS) | `admin / Gambling1!` | `bash demo.sh` |

---

## Folder Anatomy

### Docker USB Kit (e.g. `minifw-usb-hospital-v2.2.0/`)

```
minifw-usb-hospital-v2.2.0/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ demo.sh                          # Entry point вЂ” starts containers, polls readiness, opens browser
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ recover_demo.sh                  # Recovery вЂ” tears down, restarts, re-runs HEALTHCHECK
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ HEALTHCHECK.sh                   # 11-point verification script (pre-flight and live modes)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ setup_tls.sh                     # Generates local CA + signs localhost cert; installs in OS trust store
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ RECOVERY.md                      # Manual recovery steps and pre-demo checklist
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ docker/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ docker-compose.usb-hospital.yml   # Compose file вЂ” engine + web + injector services
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ entrypoint-engine.sh              # Engine container startup
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ entrypoint-web.sh                 # Web container startup
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ certs/                            # TLS certs (generated by setup_tls.sh; .gitkeep ships)
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ demo-injector/                    # Synthetic traffic injector container
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Dockerfile
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ inject.py
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ config/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ feeds/                       # Threat intelligence feeds (deny_domains, deny_ips, etc.)
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ modes/minifw_hospital/       # Sector policy (policy.json, thresholds)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ images/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ minifw-hospital.tar          # Pre-built Docker image (load once, runs offline)
в””в”Ђв”Ђ yara_rules/
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ hospital_rules.yar           # Sector-specific YARA detection rules
```

### Standalone Kit (`minifw-usb-hospital-standalone-v2.2.0/`)

```
minifw-usb-hospital-standalone-v2.2.0/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ run_demo.sh                      # Entry point вЂ” activates venv, starts engine + web, opens browser
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ recover_demo.sh                  # Recovery вЂ” kills stale processes, resets DB, relaunches
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ HEALTHCHECK.sh                   # 11-point verification script (pre-flight and live modes)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ RECOVERY.md                      # Manual recovery steps and pre-demo checklist
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ INSTALL.md                       # First-time setup instructions
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app/                             # Full application source (engine daemon + web admin)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ config/                          # Threat feeds and sector policy
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ demo_data/                       # Synthetic traffic patterns for DEMO_MODE simulator
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ normal_traffic.json
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ attack_traffic.json
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ models/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ mlp_model.pkl                # Pre-trained MLP classifier
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ venv/                            # Pre-built Python virtualenv (offline-ready, no pip install needed)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ yara_rules/                      # YARA detection rules
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ requirements.txt                 # Pinned dependencies (for venv rebuild if needed)
в””в”Ђв”Ђ logs/                            # Runtime-generated (empty on clean package; created by demo)
```

---

## What Is and Is Not Shipped

| Item | Shipped? | Reason |
|------|----------|--------|
| `venv/` | Yes | Enables offline demos вЂ” no pip install required |
| `images/*.tar` | Yes | Docker kits run without internet on first load |
| `__pycache__/` | No | Runtime-generated; rebuilt automatically |
| `logs/` contents | No | Runtime-generated; created fresh each demo run |
| `minifw.db` | No | Runtime-generated SQLite; created fresh on first start |

---

## Reproducibility вЂ” Pre-flight Verification

Run before any demo to confirm the package is complete and functional:

```bash
# Any package вЂ” pre-flight mode (no demo running required)
bash HEALTHCHECK.sh

# Expected: 11/11 PASS, exit 0
```

A non-zero exit or any FAIL line means the package is incomplete. Common fixes: re-run `setup_tls.sh` (Docker kits) or check `venv/` integrity (standalone).

---

## Build Provenance

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Version tag | `v2.2.0` |
| GPG signing key | `BDB471E1FB46F58A` |
| Rebuild from source | `bash build_usb.sh <sector>` |
| Release verification | `docs/release-verification.md` |

To verify a package was built from the signed release:

```bash
git verify-tag v2.2.0
```
